allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name ILIKE '%concept%';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT 'opendata' as schema, count\(*\) FROM opendata.concepts UNION ALL SELECT 'public', count\(*\) FROM public.concepts;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d postgres -c "\\d opendata.concepts")
